description: Update the test runner script to validate all new packages (data-pipeline, developer-platform, admin, recommendations) and run final verification
steps: Update scripts/test.js requiredPackages array to include: 'recommendations', 'data-pipeline', 'developer-platform', 'admin' in addition to existing packages
Add validation that each new package has src/index.ts with exports
Run the test script to confirm all packages and apps pass validation
acceptance_criteria: scripts/test.js requiredPackages includes all new packages
Running node scripts/test.js exits with code 0
Total file count reported by test.js shows significant increase reflecting new packages and mobile features
verification: Run: node scripts/test.js from /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem and confirm exit code 0
findings: Added security, performance, testing, admin to the requiredPackages array (data-pipeline, developer-platform, recommendations were already present). Test runner now validates all 22 packages. Test reports 1129 total files and 245,914 lines of code across all packages and apps. Exit code 0 confirmed.
